gates.name: approval-gate

notes: Operator attestation only. This file does not prove the gates occurred.
Static validation, tags, and production readiness require scripts/verify-release-evidence.sh.
Simulated --active probes are a separate evidence class and are not live proof.
package.git_rev must equal the release candidate HEAD; unknown revisions are not release-eligible.
runtime.support_tier and runtime.mcp_enforcement are required and must match runtimes/registry.yaml for the attested runtime.
